title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
